actions.script:
Set<String> allowedProviders = ["OPENAI", "GEMINI"] as Set<String> String provider = allowedProviders.contains(llmProvider) ? llmProvider : "OPENAI"
Map defaultByProvider = [ OPENAI: [baseUrl: "https://api.openai.com", model: "gpt-4.1-mini", timeout: "45"], GEMINI: [baseUrl: "https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com", model: "gemini-2.0-flash", timeout: "45"] ]
def existingProviderRemote = ec.entity.find("moqui.service.message.SystemMessageRemote") .condition("systemMessageRemoteId", provider + "_RULE_WORKSPACE") .useCache(false) .one() Map defaults = defaultByProvider[provider]
String modelToUse = existingProviderRemote?.username?.toString()?.trim() ?: defaults.model String baseUrlToUse = existingProviderRemote?.sendUrl?.toString()?.trim() ?: defaults.baseUrl String timeoutToUse = existingProviderRemote?.internalAppCode?.toString()?.trim() ?: defaults.timeout if (!(timeoutToUse ==~ /\d+/)) timeoutToUse = defaults.timeout
Map llmRemoteMap = [ systemMessageRemoteId: provider + "_RULE_WORKSPACE", description : provider + " settings for Rule Workspace DRL generation", sendUrl : baseUrlToUse, username : modelToUse, internalAppCode : timeoutToUse, remoteAttributes : "Y", sendServiceName : provider ] if (llmApiKey) { llmRemoteMap.password = llmApiKey } else if (existingProviderRemote?.password) { llmRemoteMap.password = existingProviderRemote.password } context.llmRemoteMap = llmRemoteMap
context.llmActiveMap = [ systemMessageRemoteId: "RULE_WORKSPACE_LLM_ACTIVE", description : "Active provider for Rule Workspace DRL generation", username : provider, remoteAttributes : "Y" ] context.llmProviderLabel = provider

pre-actions.script:
Set<String> allowedProviders = ["OPENAI", "GEMINI"] as Set<String> Map defaultByProvider = [ OPENAI: [baseUrl: "https://api.openai.com", model: "gpt-4.1-mini", timeout: "45", keyEnv: "OPENAI_API_KEY", modelEnv: "OPENAI_MODEL", baseUrlEnv: "OPENAI_API_BASE_URL", timeoutEnv: "OPENAI_TIMEOUT_SECONDS"], GEMINI: [baseUrl: "https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com", model: "gemini-2.0-flash", timeout: "45", keyEnv: "GEMINI_API_KEY", modelEnv: "GEMINI_MODEL", baseUrlEnv: "GEMINI_API_BASE_URL", timeoutEnv: "GEMINI_TIMEOUT_SECONDS"] ]
String providerFromParam = llmProvider?.toString()?.trim()?.toUpperCase() def activeProviderRec = ec.entity.find("moqui.service.message.SystemMessageRemote") .condition("systemMessageRemoteId", "RULE_WORKSPACE_LLM_ACTIVE") .useCache(false) .one() String activeProvider = activeProviderRec?.username?.toString()?.trim()?.toUpperCase() if (!allowedProviders.contains(activeProvider)) activeProvider = "OPENAI"
String selectedProvider = allowedProviders.contains(providerFromParam) ? providerFromParam : activeProvider Map defaults = defaultByProvider[selectedProvider]
def llmRemote = ec.entity.find("moqui.service.message.SystemMessageRemote") .condition("systemMessageRemoteId", selectedProvider + "_RULE_WORKSPACE") .useCache(false) .one()
String fallbackModel = (System.getenv(defaults.modelEnv) ?: ec.resource.properties["darpan.${selectedProvider.toLowerCase()}.model"] ?: defaults.model)?.toString() String fallbackBaseUrl = (System.getenv(defaults.baseUrlEnv) ?: ec.resource.properties["darpan.${selectedProvider.toLowerCase()}.baseUrl"] ?: defaults.baseUrl)?.toString() String fallbackTimeout = (System.getenv(defaults.timeoutEnv) ?: ec.resource.properties["darpan.${selectedProvider.toLowerCase()}.timeoutSeconds"] ?: defaults.timeout)?.toString() String fallbackKey = System.getenv(defaults.keyEnv)?.toString() if (!fallbackKey && selectedProvider == "OPENAI") fallbackKey = (ec.resource.properties["darpan.openai.apiKey"] ?: "").toString()
context.activeLlmProvider = activeProvider context.llmProvider = selectedProvider context.llmModel = llmRemote?.username ?: fallbackModel context.llmBaseUrl = llmRemote?.sendUrl ?: fallbackBaseUrl context.llmTimeoutSeconds = (llmRemote?.internalAppCode ?: fallbackTimeout)?.toString() context.llmEnabled = llmRemote?.remoteAttributes ?: "Y" context.hasStoredLlmApiKey = !!(llmRemote?.password?.toString()?.trim()) context.hasFallbackLlmApiKey = !!(fallbackKey?.trim()) && !context.hasStoredLlmApiKey context.fallbackLlmKeyEnvName = defaults.keyEnv

label.text: Configure provider credentials for Rule Workspace DRL generation.
Only provider and API key are required. Model, base URL, and timeout use defaults automatically.
Stored API Key (${llmProvider}): ${hasStoredLlmApiKey ? 'Yes' : 'No'}${hasStoredLlmApiKey ? '' : (hasFallbackLlmApiKey ? ' (environment fallback ' + fallbackLlmKeyEnvName + ' active)' : '')}

default-field.title: API Key (leave blank to keep existing)
